zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Ferrers II於1303年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比時，他的父親William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby31歲，母親Margaret Segrave29歲。他於1331年2月20日之前與Isabel de Verdun在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年9月15日在他的家鄉享年40歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Ferrers II于1303年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比时，他的父亲William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby31岁，母亲Margaret Segrave29岁。他于1331年2月20日之前与Isabel de Verdun在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1343年9月15日在他的家乡享年40岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Ferrers II was born in 1303, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, his father, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Segrave, was 29. He married Isabel de Verdun before 20 February 1331, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 15 September 1343, in his hometown, at the age of 40, and was buried in Leicester, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Ferrers II est né en 1303, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Segrave, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Verdun avant 20 février 1331, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1343, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Ferrers II 1303 in Groby, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Segrave 29. Er hat vor 20. Februar 1331 in England, United Kingdom Isabel de Verdun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. September 1343 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Leicester, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Ferrers II è nato il nel 1303 nel Groby, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Segrave, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Verdun prima del 20 febbraio 1331, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 settembre 1343, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Leicester, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Ferrers IIが1303年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで生まれた時，父William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Grobyは31歳，母Margaret Segraveは29歳であった。1331年2月20日以前にイギリスイギリスでIsabel de Verdunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年9月15日に故郷で40歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Ferrers II(이)가 1303년 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Segrave(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1331년 2월 20일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Isabel de Verdun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 9월 15일 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에 묻혔다.

mn.Warwick, Warwickshire, England: Warwick, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Ferrers II nasceu em 1303, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Segrave, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Verdun antes 20 de fevereiro de 1331, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1343, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Ferrers II родился в 1303 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Segrave, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Verdun перед 20 февраль 1331 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 15 сентября 1343 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Ferrers II nació en 1303, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Segrave, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Isabel de Verdun antes de 20 de febrero de 1331, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1343, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
